runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (16.88) when seventh over 278m at Launceston in a Grade 3/4. Has two successes and two minors from eight starts from box 1. Will need some luck to feature.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Launceston over 278m. Last start finished 2nd on April 13 over 278m at Launceston behind Don't Slip Mick beaten half a length (16.00) in a Special conditions race. In form and can return to the winners' list.
